rows.notes: Adopted gemini-flash's description as it accurately matches the visible text 'A Recepta & Novris die 2do 1767'. Visual verification showed other extractors had significant misreadings of the initial words and year (e.g., claude-haiku's '1797').

Adopted gemini-flash for description and amounts. Visual verification confirms 'Kenton ad Fest: annu:' for description and 4 pounds, 4 shillings, 4 pence. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku misread the description (as 'Weston'). gpt-5-mini also misread shillings as 11.

Adopted gemini-flash for description and amounts. Visual verification confirms '- ad Fest Mich:' and 2 pounds, 4 shillings, 4 pence. All other extractors had significant misreadings of the description and/or amounts.

Adopted gemini-flash/gpt-5-mini for description and pounds. Shillings, pence, and fraction were consistent across all extractors. Visual verification confirms 'Chace Hill pro Bien:' and 17 pounds, 2 shillings, 9 pence. claude-haiku misread the description and pounds as 19.

rows.description: Yardington Rect: pro Dim: an: ad Mich:
rows.notes: Adopted gemini-flash for description and pounds. Shillings, pence, and fraction were consistent across all extractors. Visual verification confirms 'Yardington Rect: pro Dim: an: ad Mich:' and 5 pounds, 0 shillings, 0 pence. claude-haiku misread pounds as 9 and had a less accurate description.
All extractors agreed on the monetary values: 8 pounds, 14 shillings, 5.5 pence (with a clear '½' fraction). Adopted gemini-flash's description as it was the most accurate.
All extractors agreed on the monetary values: 5 pounds, 0 shillings, 10 pence. Adopted gemini-flash's description as it was the most accurate.

Adopted gemini-flash's description and values. Visual verification clearly shows 0 pounds, 6 shillings, 3 pence. gpt-5-mini misread pounds as 13 and shillings as 19 and incorrectly identified a fraction. claude-haiku also correctly identified amounts but misread description.

Adopted gemini-flash's description and values. Visual verification confirms 'Headington Mills pro an:' and amounts as 13 pounds, 19 shillings, 3.75 pence with a clear '¾' fraction. Other extractors had significant misreadings of description and/or amounts.
All extractors agreed on the monetary values: 6 pounds, 19 shillings, 8 pence. Adopted gemini-flash's description as it was the most accurate.

Adopted gemini-flash's description. Visual verification confirms amounts as 10 pounds, 9 shillings, 11.25 pence, with a clear '¼' fraction. gpt-5-mini correctly identified the numerical values and fraction. claude-haiku misidentified the fraction as 0.5. gemini-flash completely misread the amounts, appearing to have copied from the previous row.

Adopted gemini-flash's description. Visual verification confirms amounts as 1 pound, 15 shillings, 0 pence. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku correctly identified the amounts. gemini-flash appears to have repeated the amounts from the previous row.

Adopted gemini-flash's description. Visual verification confirms amounts as 26 pounds, 14 shillings, 6.5 pence. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku correctly identified the amounts and fraction. gemini-flash appears to have repeated the amounts from the previous row.

Adopted gemini-flash's description. Visual verification confirms amounts as 2 pounds, 1 shilling, 4 pence. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku correctly identified the amounts but misread the description. gemini-flash incorrectly repeated values from the previous row.

Adopted gemini-flash's description. Visual verification confirms amounts as 5 pounds, 9 shillings, 7.5 pence, with a clear '½' fraction. gpt-5-mini correctly identified these values. claude-haiku misread shillings as 5. gemini-flash incorrectly repeated values from the previous row.
Visual verification confirms description and amounts as 9 pounds, 6 shillings, 8 pence. All extractors had misreadings for this row, with gemini-flash again repeating values from the previous row.

Adopted gemini-flash's description. Visual verification confirms amounts as 6 pounds, 13 shillings, 4 pence. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku correctly identified the amounts. gemini-flash incorrectly repeated values from the previous row.

Adopted gemini-flash's description. Visual verification confirms amounts as 1 pound, 13 shillings, 4 pence. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku correctly identified the amounts. gemini-flash incorrectly repeated values from the previous row.

Adopted gemini-flash's description. Visual verification confirms amounts as 5 pounds, 14 shillings, 3 pence. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku correctly identified the amounts. gemini-flash incorrectly repeated values from the previous row.

Visual verification confirms description 'Gaylor upper Lost pro an:' and amounts as 4 pounds, 9 shillings, 3.5 pence. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku correctly identified the numerical values and fraction but misread the description. gemini-flash correctly identified the description but misread the numerical values.

Adopted gemini-flash's description. Visual verification confirms amounts as 0 pounds, 15 shillings, 9.25 pence, with a clear '¼' fraction. gpt-5-mini correctly identified these values and the fraction. claude-haiku misidentified the fraction as 0.5. gemini-flash incorrectly repeated values from the previous row.

Visual verification confirms description 'Minchin olim Barnett pro an:' and amounts as 3 pounds, 6 shillings, 8 pence. gpt-5-mini correctly identified these amounts. claude-haiku misread pounds and shillings. gemini-flash incorrectly repeated values from the previous row.

rows.description: Little Few Quit Rent pro an:
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms description 'Little Few Quit Rent pro an:' and amounts as 0 pounds, 0 shillings, 6 pence. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku correctly identified the amounts but misread the description. gemini-flash incorrectly repeated values from the previous row.

Visual verification confirms description 'Curnock Weste pro an:'. The pounds figure is '83'; the '3' has a descender which can make it look like a 'g' or 'y', but it is consistent with other '3's on the page. gpt-5-mini read it as '85' and claude-haiku as '25'. Shillings is clearly 0, pence is 1. gemini-flash incorrectly repeated values from the previous row.

Adopted gemini-flash's description and values. Its note accurately explains the potentially ambiguous '3' digit. Visual verification confirms 83 pounds, 0 shillings, 1 pence. Other extractors misread the description and amounts.

rows.description: South Newington Rect: pro Dim: an: ad Mich:
rows.notes: Adopted gemini-flash's description and amounts. Visual verification confirms 30 pounds, 0 shillings, 0 pence. Other extractors had significant misreadings of the pounds amount and description.

Adopted gemini-flash's description and amounts. Its note accurately explains the potentially ambiguous '5' digit. Visual verification confirms 25 pounds, 0 shillings, 0 pence. Other extractors misread the description and amount.
Adopted gemini-flash's description and amounts. Visual verification confirms 17 pounds, 10 shillings, 0 pence. Other extractors had significant misreadings of the amounts and description.
Adopted gemini-flash's description and amounts. Visual verification confirms 2 pounds, 0 shillings, 0 pence. Other extractors misread the pounds amount and description.

Adopted gemini-flash's description and amounts. Visual verification confirms 1 pound, 0 shillings, 0 pence. gpt-5-mini also correctly identified the amounts, but claude-haiku misread pounds as zero and had a less accurate description.
